vlm.summary: A multi-lane urban street intersection is shown with several vehicles waiting ahead and distant high-rise buildings in the background.
vlm.interpretation: The scene appears to be a city arterial or downtown approach road at an intersection, viewed from inside a vehicle, likely stopped or moving slowly in traffic.
vlm.context: Urban roadway with queued traffic and surrounding dense development.
observations: Multiple cars ahead in the same direction
Traffic lights visible in the distance
Lane arrows and lane markings on the road
Camera viewpoint appears from inside a vehicle
safety_notes: Traffic signal compliance is important here
Vehicles are closely spaced, so rear-end risk may be present
Intersection crossing requires attention to signal phase
vlm.uncertainty: Exact signal state, vehicle direction, and whether the camera vehicle is stopped or moving are not fully certain from the image.
